description: Australian Mathematics Competition practice for Years 3-4 (Middle Primary Division). Original questions in the AMC style — arithmetic, patterns, logic, measurement, time, and problem solving.
answer_format: All questions have a single correct answer: multiple choice (A-E) or a whole number (0-999).

quick_practice.description: Short burst of AMC-style questions. Great for daily warm-up.

topic_test.marks_distribution: 3 for easy, 4 for medium, 5 for harder
topic_test.description: Focused practice on a specific topic area.

full_paper.marks_distribution: Q1-10: 3 marks, Q11-20: 4 marks, Q21-25: 5 marks, Q26-30: 6-10 marks
full_paper.description: Full-length AMC practice paper in the real competition format.

media_guidance: Minimal diagrams — most questions are text-only. Simple diagrams (shapes, number lines, grids) can be described in text or generated as simple SVGs.
feedback_guidance: Keep explanations simple and concrete. Use worked examples. No algebra unless the question involves it. Aim for explanations a Year 3-4 student can follow.
